info.title: Verlite.CLI
info.description: Lightweight automatic versioning via Git tags for continuous delivery for the other build systems.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: SymbolExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ModelBindingCommandHandler.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

options.name: tag-prefix
options.description: Tags starting with this represent versions.

options.name: default-prerelease-phase
options.description:
The default phase for the prerlease label.
For MinVer compatibility, set this to "alpha.0".

options.name: min-version
options.description: The minimum RTM version, i.e the destined version.

options.name: prerelease-base-height
options.description:
The height for continious deliverable auto heights should begin at.
For MinVer compatibility, set this to 0.

options.name: version-override
options.description: Force the calculated version to be this version.

options.name: verbosity
options.description: The level of logging to output.

options.name: build-metadata
options.description: Set the build data to this value.

options.name: show
options.description: The version part which should be written to stdout.

options.name: auto-fetch
options.description: Automatically fetch commits from a shallow repository until a version tag is encountered.

options.name: enable-lightweight-tags
options.description: Create a lightweight tag instead of fetching the remote's.

options.name: enable-shadow-repo
options.description: Use a shadow repro for shallow clones using filter branches to fetch only commits.

options.name: dirty-version-bump
options.description: Any non-ignored modifications to the repo result in a version bump.

options.name: auto-increment
options.description: Which version part should be bumped after an RTM release.

options.name: filter-tags
options.description: Specify a command to execute, an exit code of 0 will not filter the tag.

options.name: remote
options.description: The remote endpoint to use when fetching tags and commits.

arguments.name: revision
arguments.description: The revision to parse and calculate a version for. [default: ]
